title: Statistics
descriptionAuthenticated: View your statistics, leaderboard, and game history
descriptionGuest: See how you rank against other players

performance.emptyDescription: Start playing trivia games to see your performance stats and trends here!
performance.comparisonDescription: See how you perform compared to other players
performance.trendsDescription: Your score and success rate trends over time
performance.questionsAnsweredPerTopicDesc: Questions answered per topic and percentage distribution
performance.gamesPlayedPerTopicDesc: Number of games played per topic and percentage distribution
performance.barLengthQuestionsDesc: Bar length = questions answered. Color = success rate (red → green). Hover for details.
performance.barLengthGamesDesc: Bar length = games played. Color = success rate (red → green). Hover for details.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.descriptionGlobal: See how you rank against other players • All-time statistics
leaderboard.descriptionPeriod: See how you rank against other players • Statistics for the selected period
leaderboard.noDataDescription: Leaderboard data will appear once users start playing.

history.emptyDescription: Start playing trivia games to build your history and track your progress!
history.title: Game History
history.errorDescription: Unable to fetch your game history. Please try again later.
history.deleteGameRecordDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this game record? This action cannot be undone.
history.clearAllHistoryDesc: This will permanently delete all {{count}} game records. This action cannot be undone.
history.adjustFiltersOrSort: Adjust filters or sort to see more.
